---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Gonzalo Salomoni"
date: "2026-06-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
```

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# 1. MAPA WARDS 2021
# -----------------------------

wards2021 <- st_read(
  "C:/Users/gonza/Documents/Irlanda del Norte/osni_open_data_largescale_boundaries_wards_2012.geojson",
  quiet = TRUE
)

identity_2021_wards <- read_excel(
  "C:/Users/gonza/Documents/Irlanda del Norte/census-2021_identidad.xlsx",
  sheet = "Ward",
  skip = 7
) %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      -c(Geography, `Geography code`),
      as.numeric
    )
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    ward = Geography,
    ward_code = `Geography code`,

    british =
      `British only` +
      `British and Irish only` +
      `British and Northern Irish only` +
      `British, Irish and Northern Irish only`,

    irish =
      `Irish only` +
      `British and Irish only` +
      `Irish and Northern Irish only` +
      `British, Irish and Northern Irish only`,

    northern_irish =
      `Northern Irish only` +
      `British and Northern Irish only` +
      `Irish and Northern Irish only` +
      `British, Irish and Northern Irish only`,

    identidad = case_when(
      british == pmax(british, irish, northern_irish, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "Identidad británica",
      irish == pmax(british, irish, northern_irish, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "Identidad irlandesa",
      northern_irish == pmax(british, irish, northern_irish, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "Identidad norirlandesa"
    )
  )

map_wards_2021 <- wards2021 %>%
  left_join(
    identity_2021_wards,
    by = c("WardCode" = "ward_code")
  )
```

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# 2. MAPA DEA2014 2021
# -----------------------------

dz_mapa <- st_read(
  "C:/Users/gonza/Documents/Irlanda del Norte/geography-dz2021-geojson/DZ2021.geojson",
  quiet = TRUE
)

dea_mapa <- dz_mapa %>%
  group_by(DEA2014_cd, DEA2014_nm) %>%
  summarise(
    geometry = st_union(geometry),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

identity_2021_dea <- read_excel(
  "C:/Users/gonza/Documents/Irlanda del Norte/Census2021_national identity.xlsx",
  sheet = "Table",
  skip = 4
) %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      -c(
        `District Electoral Area 2014 Code`,
        `District Electoral Area 2014 Label`
      ),
      as.numeric
    )
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    dea_code = `District Electoral Area 2014 Code`,
    dea_name = `District Electoral Area 2014 Label`,

    british =
      `British only` +
      `British and Irish only` +
      `British and Northern Irish only` +
      `British, Irish and Northern Irish only`,

    irish =
      `Irish only` +
      `British and Irish only` +
      `Irish and Northern Irish only` +
      `British, Irish and Northern Irish only`,

    northern_irish =
      `Northern Irish only` +
      `British and Northern Irish only` +
      `Irish and Northern Irish only` +
      `British, Irish and Northern Irish only`,

    identidad = case_when(
      british == pmax(british, irish, northern_irish, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "Identidad británica",
      irish == pmax(british, irish, northern_irish, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "Identidad irlandesa",
      northern_irish == pmax(british, irish, northern_irish, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "Identidad norirlandesa"
    )
  )

map_dea_2021 <- dea_mapa %>%
  left_join(
    identity_2021_dea,
    by = c("DEA2014_cd" = "dea_code")
  )
```

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# 3. COMPROBAR UNIONES
# -----------------------------

map_wards_2021 %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  summarise(
    total = n(),
    con_datos = sum(!is.na(identidad)),
    sin_datos = sum(is.na(identidad))
  )

map_dea_2021 %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  summarise(
    total = n(),
    con_datos = sum(!is.na(identidad)),
    sin_datos = sum(is.na(identidad))
  )
```

```{r}
# Crear categoría con escala tipo Wikipedia
crear_escala_identidad <- function(data) {
  data %>%
    mutate(
      total_id = british + irish + northern_irish,
      british_pct = british / total_id * 100,
      irish_pct = irish / total_id * 100,
      
      identidad_escala = case_when(
        irish_pct >= 80 ~ "80-100% irlandesa",
        irish_pct >= 60 ~ "60-80% irlandesa",
        irish_pct >= 40 ~ "40-60% irlandesa",
        
        british_pct < 40 & irish_pct < 40 ~ "Ambas bajo 40%",
        
        british_pct >= 80 ~ "80-100% británica",
        british_pct >= 60 ~ "60-80% británica",
        british_pct >= 40 ~ "40-60% británica",
        
        TRUE ~ "Ambas bajo 40%"
      )
    )
}

map_wards_2021 <- crear_escala_identidad(map_wards_2021)
map_dea_2021 <- crear_escala_identidad(map_dea_2021)
```


```{r}
# -----------------------------
# 4. FUNCIÓN DE MAPA
# -----------------------------

hacer_mapa_identidad_escala <- function(data, mostrar_leyenda = TRUE) {
  
  ggplot() +
    geom_sf(
      data = data,
      aes(fill = identidad_escala),
      color = "grey35",
      linewidth = 0.12
    ) +
    geom_sf(
      data = st_union(data),
      fill = NA,
      color = "grey20",
      linewidth = 0.4
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c(
        "80-100% irlandesa" = "#006400",
        "60-80% irlandesa"  = "#228B22",
        "40-60% irlandesa"  = "#90EE90",
      
        "Ambas bajo 40%"    = "#F5F5F5",
      
        "40-60% británica"  = "#FB6A4A",
        "60-80% británica"  = "#DE2D26",
        "80-100% británica" = "#A50F15"
      ),
      breaks = c(
        "80-100% irlandesa",
        "60-80% irlandesa",
        "40-60% irlandesa",
        "Ambas bajo 40%",
        "40-60% británica",
        "60-80% británica",
        "80-100% británica"
      ),
      name = NULL,
      na.value = "#F7F7F7"
    ) +
    coord_sf(datum = NA) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      legend.position = if (mostrar_leyenda) c(0.05, 0.95) else "none",
      legend.justification = c(0, 1),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.25, "cm"),
      plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)
    )
}
```

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# 5. CREAR MAPAS Y JUNTARLOS
# -----------------------------

p_wards <- hacer_mapa_identidad_escala(
  map_wards_2021,
  mostrar_leyenda = TRUE
)

p_dea <- hacer_mapa_identidad_escala(
  map_dea_2021,
  mostrar_leyenda = FALSE
)

grid.arrange(
  p_wards,
  p_dea,
  ncol = 2,
  top = "Identidad nacional"
)
```

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# 6. GUARDAR
# -----------------------------

png(
  "identidad_2021_wards_vs_dea.png",
  width = 3000,
  height = 1500,
  res = 300
)

grid.arrange(
  p_wards,
  p_dea,
  ncol = 2,
  top = "Identidad nacional en Irlanda del Norte, 2021: wards vs DEA2014"
)

dev.off()
```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```
